proposalPanel.title: AI panel
proposalPanel.emptyHint: AI results will appear here after you send a prompt from the context panel.

sceneAuditPrompt.question: Analyze the scene for new characters and world elements?
sceneAuditPrompt.hint: The analysis will add anything found as separate cards in this panel. Nothing is saved to canon without acceptance.

sceneAssignment.listLabel: Elements to assign to the scene
sceneAssignment.hint: The assignment only changes this scene's relations or the world element's relations. The entity canon stays unchanged.
sceneAssignment.assignTitle: Assign the element to its source scene
sceneAssignment.error: Could not assign the element to the scene.

sceneCritique.applyTitleReady: Select the quoted fragment and send it for rewriting
sceneCritique.applyTitleDisabled: Open this scene in the editor to apply the note

sceneDiscovery.generateTitle: Add the full proposal to the AI queue

discoveryDisabledReason.relation: A relation requires two existing characters identified by the analysis.
discoveryDisabledReason.memory: A memory requires pointing to an existing character.

queueItem.queuedHint: The task is waiting for the previous generation in the queue to finish.
queueItem.generatingResult: {{provider}} is generating the result. The proposal won't be saved without acceptance.
queueItem.coverPreviewTitle: Open the cover in full preview
queueItem.coverReady: The cover is ready to accept.
queueItem.editFieldTitle: You can adjust the proposal for the {{label}} field before saving.
queueItem.planLabel: Proposal to apply in the Plan view
queueItem.planNote: Accepting saves only the scope of this plan view. The remaining sections of the AI response will be skipped.
queueItem.sceneEditorNote: Accepting applies the text in the active scene editor according to the insert mode saved in the prompt. Until then the manuscript stays unchanged.
queueItem.auditDone: Analysis complete. Found elements were added as cards in the right panel.
queueItem.critiqueDone: Critique complete. Editor notes appeared as cards in this panel.
queueItem.retryTitle: Re-run the same prompt with the saved context snapshot.

log.title: Prompt and response log
log.loadErrorHint: Check that the Tauri backend has access to the local SQLite database.
log.emptyHint: The prompt and response will appear here after the first AI generation in the project.
log.costTitle: Estimated cost per official pricing (~ = estimated tokens)
log.promptEmpty: No saved prompt for this older entry.
log.applyError: Could not apply the proposal from the AI log.
log.terminated: Generation was interrupted by closing the application.

codexStatus.title: Codex CLI status
codexStatus.catalogFallback: Fallback when the model catalog is unavailable
codexStatus.binaryPathTitle: Command or path to Codex CLI, e.g. codex or the full path to the binary.
codexStatus.checkTitle: Check Codex CLI and refresh the model catalog
codexStatus.modelTitle: Model used by codex exec when generating field content.
codexStatus.backendUnavailable: The Tauri backend is not available in this view or the command could not be run.
codexStatus.loginHint: Run `codex` in a terminal and log in with the official Codex CLI method. Bowri does not store tokens or credentials.

promptContext.promptSizeTitle: Prompt size with the currently selected context
promptContext.authorCommentPlaceholder: The most important intent for the next prompt
promptContext.submitDisabled: The AI request is unavailable right now.
promptContext.submitTitle: Send the next AI request with the selected context.

planVersion.name: AI variant: {{label}}
planVersion.description: Created from an accepted AI proposal.

errors.newProjectAcceptUnsupported: Accepting a new project proposal is not supported.
errors.coverIncomplete: The cover proposal is incomplete and cannot be accepted.
errors.characterImageIncomplete: The character image proposal is incomplete and cannot be accepted.
errors.exportArtworkIncomplete: The export artwork proposal is incomplete and cannot be accepted.
errors.sceneFormClosed: There is no longer an open scene form for this AI proposal.
errors.beatFormClosed: There is no longer an open beat form for this AI proposal.
errors.characterFormClosed: There is no longer an open form for this character proposal.
errors.worldFormClosed: There is no longer an open form for this world proposal.
errors.sceneEditorMissingScene: There is no active scene for the editor proposal.
errors.sceneEditorFormClosed: There is no longer an open scene editor for this AI proposal.
errors.sceneNotFound: The scene to assign was not found.
errors.noProjectForCharacter: No project for saving the AI character.
errors.characterNotFound: The character for this AI proposal was not found.
errors.noCharacterDataForRelation: Missing character data for saving the AI relation.
errors.noCharacterDataForMemory: Missing character data for saving the AI memory.
errors.noProjectForWorldElement: No project for saving the AI world element.
errors.noProjectForWorldRule: No project for saving the AI world rule.
errors.selectAtLeastOneField: Select at least one field to save.
errors.coverPromptMissing: The cover prompt is missing from the queued task.
errors.characterImagePromptMissing: The character image prompt is missing from the queued task.
errors.characterImageTargetMissing: No target character for the image.
errors.exportArtworkPromptMissing: The export artwork prompt is missing from the queued task.
errors.characterImageFailed: Could not create the character image.
errors.exportArtworkFailed: Could not create the export artwork.
errors.invalidCharacterKind: The AI returned an invalid character proposal type (kind: {{kind}}).
errors.characterFieldMismatch: The AI returned a proposal for field {{field}}, expected {{expected}}.
errors.invalidWorldKind: The AI returned an invalid world proposal type (kind: {{kind}}).
errors.worldFieldMismatch: The AI returned a proposal for field {{field}}, expected {{expected}}.
